title: SugarLib
description: A multi-loader Minecraft library providing easy-to-use configs for both developers and players.
body:
A multi-loader Minecraft library providing easy-to-use configs for both developers and players.

## For Developers
Information for developers can be found in the [README file](https://github.com/AlignedCookie88/SugarLib/blob/main/README.md) in the GitHub repository.
